name: detail-page
description: Reusable Korean detail-page design skill capture tooling.

scripts.lint:tokens: node scripts/build-tokens.js tokens/brand-default.tokens.json --emit=theme 2>/dev/null | node -e 'const f=require('\''fs'\'');function D(css){css=css.replace(/\/\*[\s\S]*?\*\//g,'\'' '\'').replace(/<!--[\s\S]*?-->/g,'\'' '\'');const i=css.indexOf('\''@theme'\'');if(i<0)throw new Error('\''no @theme block'\'');let s=css.indexOf('\''{'\'',i),d=0,e=-1;for(let j=s;j<css.length;j++){if(css[j]==='\''{'\'')d++;else if(css[j]==='\''}'\''){d--;if(d===0){e=j;break;}}}const o={};for(const m of css.slice(s+1,e).matchAll(/(--[a-z0-9-]+)\s*:\s*([^;]+);/gi))o[m[1].trim()]=m[2].replace(/\s+/g,'\'' '\'').trim();return o;}const gen=D(f.readFileSync(0,'\''utf8'\''));const com=D(f.readFileSync(process.argv[process.argv.length-1],'\''utf8'\''));const ks=[...new Set([...Object.keys(gen),...Object.keys(com)])].sort();const diffs=ks.filter(k=>gen[k]!==com[k]).map(k=>({token:k,generated:gen[k]||'\''(missing)'\'',committed:com[k]||'\''(missing)'\''}));if(diffs.length){console.error('\''@theme<->DTCG DRIFT ('\''+diffs.length+'\'' token(s)) — run build-tokens.js --emit=theme and sync the committed @theme:'\'');console.error(JSON.stringify(diffs,null,2));process.exit(1);}console.log('\''@theme<->DTCG in sync ('\''+ks.length+'\'' tokens, 0 drift)'\'');' assets/starter/index.html
